at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom

Class Variable

  • java.lang.Object
    • at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util.Printable
      • at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom.TermAtom
        • at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.atom.Variable
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Cloneable, Comparable<TermAtom>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    HedgeVar, TermVar

    public abstract class Variable
extends TermAtom
    This is the base class for different types of variables.
    Author:
    Alexander Baumgartner
